quality.rationale: 张量散度计算结合洛伦兹力与麦克斯韦源方程，逻辑链条完整，属经典场论标准证明题

origin.question:
Problem 5.9. Consider a system of discrete particles of charge $\mathbf{q}_{\mathbf{i}}$ and mass $\mathfrak{m}_{\mathbf{i}}$ interacting through electromagnetic forces. From the explicit expression for $\mathrm{T}^{\mu 
u}$ of the particles show that the total $\mathrm{T}^{\mu 
u}$ (particles plus field) is conserved, i.e. that $\mathrm{T}^{\mu 
u}_{,
u} = 0$ .
